title: ResearchReportValidateResponse
description: Structured response from LLM semantic validation of a research report.

verdict.description: Overall verdict: PASS if all semantic checks pass, FAIL if any check fails.

check.description: The check name (e.g., blooms_depth, counterpoint, claim_specificity, confidence).

status.description: Whether this check passed or failed.

theme.description: The theme or section this finding applies to, or 'overall'.

detail.description: Explanation of why this check passed or failed.
